question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/repository/EntityRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: findByAlias(byte[] alias)] Can an unprivileged external user submit Hedera transactions referencing a large number of distinct, never-before-seen alias byte arrays, causing repeated cache misses in EntityIdServiceImpl.cacheLookup() and forcing a full sequential scan on the entity table for each unique alias, thereby increasing DB CPU consumption by over 30% compared to the preceding 24 hours?
